name: Dr Pepper Snapple Group, Inc.
description: Dr Pepper Snapple Group, Inc. was a leading producer of flavored beverages in North America and the Caribbean. The company manufactured, marketed, and distributed more than 50 brands of carbonated soft drinks, juices, teas, mixers, and other premium beverages. Its portfolio included iconic brands such as Dr Pepper, Snapple, 7UP, A&W, Canada Dry, Sunkist, Mott's, and Schweppes. In 2018, the company merged with Keurig Green Mountain to form Keurig Dr Pepper, creating a new beverage giant with a diverse portfolio of hot and cold drinks.
